name: Bread and Puppet Theater
description: Political puppet theater company in Glover, Vermont, founded 1963 by Peter Schumann. Known for giant outdoor pageants, political street theater with enormous papier-mâché puppets, masks, and stilts. Summer schedule includes outdoor circus performances.

name: Bread and Puppet: Museum Tour
description: Join us for a guided tour of the Bread & Puppet Museum with the puppeteers this summer! The Bread and Puppet Museum is a massive accumulation of the puppets, masks, paintings and graphics of The Bread and Puppet Theater, housed in a 150-year-old barn in Vermont’s Northeast Kingdom. It is one of the largest collections of some of the biggest puppets and masks in the world.

name: Bread and Puppet: Morality Demonology
description: Fridays, June-August 21 (no show July 3) The Paper Maché Cathedral atBread & Puppet: 753 Heights Road, Glover, VThttps://breadandpuppet.org/farm#Fridays Puppet show! Puppet show! Bread & Puppet will present an indoor performance each Friday this summer in the Paper Maché Cathedral. The show will premiere in June and continue to evolve over the course of the summer. This year’s Friday Night Show: Morality Demonology.

name: Bread and Puppet Press Talk: The Art of Struggle: Anti-Empire Talks Join B&P Pr
description: The Art of Struggle: Anti-Empire Talks Join B&P Press for a series of talks in the Paper Mâché Cathedral. Tickets are $5, with no one turned away for lack of funds. Seating in the Cathedral is limited so please be sure to book your ticket in advance.
